GOD YOU KNOW ONE FAN FIC PET PEEVE I HAVE SO BAD 😭😭 WHEN THE AUTHOR MAKES Y/N TOOOO DOWN BAD 😭😭😭

Especially is the other character is too nonchalant, or they don't describe how they other character is feeling, lord it makes y/n seem soooo pathetic it hurts and I cannot read it 👩‍🦯

moving on,

Y'all, I'm gonna have to start being mean and put people on full blast if I keep getting these requests that don't match my rules 🤨

On my ZAQA and tumblr I kinda get it since the rules aren't in your face. However—on my google form, you HAVE to SCROLL PAST the rules to leave a form, there's no way you're missing it 😭 Idk why everyone specifically keeps ignoring the characters and POVs I do, there's a list!

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
